channel.title: Docker on Shubham Singh
channel.description: Recent content in Docker on Shubham Singh

item.title: Technical Writer (GeeksforGeeks)
item.description: Outline Worked as a Technical Writing at GeeksforGeeks, creating educational content focused on DevOps, Kubernetes, Docker, and web technologies. Contributed consistently to learner-facing material and simplifying complex technical concepts for students and early-career engineers. My work reached more than 180,000 learners globally. Wrote more than 200 tutorials and articles as part of my work that reached more than 180,000 learners. These tutorials and articles were mainly focused on DevOps, Kubernetes, Docker, and Web design.
